name: HRA_EVAL_RATINGS_V
query: SELECT HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.EVAL_RATING_ID, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.EVALUATION_ID, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.REFERENCE_ID, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.REFERENCE_TYPE, HRA_EVAL_SECTION_ITEMS_V.PERF_RATING_MODEL_ID, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.PERFORMANCE_RATING_ID, HRA_EVAL_SECTION_ITEMS_V.PROF_RATING_MODEL_ID, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.PROFICIENCY_RATING_ID, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.REVIEW_POINTS, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.CALCULATED_RATING, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.ROLE_TYPE_CODE, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.COMMENT_TEXT, HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.JUSTIFICATION_TEXT, HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.SECTION_TYPE_CODE, HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVAL_SECTION_ID FROM HRA_EVAL_RATINGS JOIN HRA_EVAL_SECTION_ITEMS_V ON HRA_EVAL_SECTION_ITEMS_V.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTION_ITEMS_V.EVAL_ITEM_ID = HRA_EVAL_RATINGS.REFERENCE_ID JOIN HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS ON HRA_EVAL_SECTION_ITEMS_V.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTION_ITEMS_V.EVAL_SECTION_ID = HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVAL_SECTION_ID
